agreements.title: DARB Data Share MOU & BAA
agreements.description: Data sharing between HRA and DOF for the Data Analytics and Research Bureau (DARB), including a Business Associate Agreement covering protected health information.

agreements.title: HASA Pilot Program Data Sharing
agreements.description: Three-party data sharing agreement between HRA, CUNY, and DOHMH supporting the HIV/AIDS Services Administration (HASA) pilot program.

agreements.title: IDNYC Middle School Cards MOU
agreements.description: MOU governing distribution of IDNYC cards through DOE middle schools, covering data sharing for enrollment and verification.

agreements.title: IDNYC Enrollment Site MOU
agreements.description: MOU establishing DYCD community centers as IDNYC enrollment sites, defining data flows between DYCD and HRA/DSS for applicant processing.

agreements.title: Test and Trace Robocalls Intra-City Agreement
agreements.description: Intra-city agreement for COVID-19 Test and Trace program robocall outreach, sharing HRA/DSS client contact data with DOHMH for public health notifications.

agreements.title: DOPIS Data Sharing Agreement
agreements.description: Data sharing between HRA and NYS Office of Mental Health for the Division of Program and Policy Integration and Support, covering mental health service recipients.

agreements.title: HRA-DOHMH Health Statistics Cooperative Agreement FY20-22
agreements.description: Cooperative agreement for sharing health statistics data between HRA and DOHMH to improve service delivery and population health monitoring for FY2020-2022.

agreements.title: Finance-HRA Cooperative Agreement
agreements.description: Cooperative agreement between DOF and HRA governing use of tax and property data for benefits eligibility determination and anti-fraud efforts.

agreements.title: Inter-Agency Data Exchange Agreement (HHS)
agreements.description: Data exchange agreement for Health and Human Services programs, enabling DOF to share financial records with HRA for benefits administration.

agreements.title: MyCity Childcare Portal Data Sharing Agreement
agreements.description: 20-page data sharing agreement for the MyCity portal childcare application feature, covering exchange of ACS childcare subsidy eligibility data via the OTI-managed platform.
